overview.description: Construction in Vietnam is booming with infrastructure projects and urbanization. AI adoption is nascent but growing in site safety monitoring, BIM optimization, defect detection, and project schedule prediction.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$60B construction market; 8% CAGR; government infrastructure push drives demand
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$500B regional construction market; smart city projects accelerating AI adoption

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Low to medium — project-based; data fragmented across contractors
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Low — paper-based processes still dominant; limited digital adoption

painPoints.problem: Safety incidents on sites are common; PPE compliance is hard to monitor at scale
Project delays and cost overruns are endemic due to poor scheduling
Structural defect detection post-construction is manual and slow
Document management (contracts, permits, drawings) is chaotic

relatedNodes.description: Construction uses manufactured materials; similar IoT monitoring patterns.
